list.name: skill
list.description: Do you ever finish a sketchbook? This page is not about perfection, it's an continiously growing archive of my body of work. Explore my skills, learn from my mistakes & findings!

list.name: gear
list.description: Tinkering, crafting, exploring. I like to challenge myself with something I am not familiar with whether it may be a camera or rollerskates—as long as it is in the means of expression.

list.name: team
list.description: On my life's journey I've encountered amazing people. Shared experiences, pushing visions forward together. I might be proud on every journey I've partaken.

list.name: about
list.description: There have been amazing teams I’ve crossed paths with. Shared experiences and collective visions shape the milestones of my professional life into a pattern when visualized. Please explore my interactive curriculum vitae.
